caption: A man wearing a green t-shirt and a black baseball cap with headphones is recorded in what appears to be a retail clothing store, surrounded by racks of apparel and framed photos on the walls. In the initial scene, he is shown from the side, facing away from the camera toward a black backdrop that reads "WHERE BOSSES TALK" and "LET'S TALK ABOUT IT" and "CONNECT WITH US." He is positioned behind a professional microphone. As the sequence progresses, the camera shifts to a front-facing view of the man, who is speaking into the microphone. His green shirt features the text "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK." A mannequin wearing a white shirt and other clothing items on racks are visible in the background. Logos for "BOSSY" and other brands appear as watermarks in the corners of the scene.
